global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with game icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to play the game and win rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A grid layout showing four game icons with circular highlights, set against an orange background.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A single game icon displayed in a rectangular box with a circular highlight, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: Another game icon in a rectangular box with a circular highlight, similar in style to the previous icon.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A third game icon in a rectangular box with a circular highlight, maintaining the same design theme.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Win epic rewards' prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline
elements.description: Smaller white text saying 'Play with friends tonight' positioned just below the main headline.

elements.label: Icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located at the top right corner, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: Icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon located at the top left corner, similar in style to the previous icon.

elements.label: Icon
elements.description: A small circular icon centered below the main content area, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: Icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon centered below the previous icon, maintaining the same design theme.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Try for free' positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Game logo
elements.description: The logo 'GlitchWave' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in bold text.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold white text button at the bottom of the ad inviting users to 'Try for free'.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, game icons, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by game icons in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
